title: Fix storage.getConfigDir() to honor PROMPT_SCRUB_CONFIG_DIR override
description: Make storage honor an explicit config dir override env var so tests can isolate on any platform (macOS included). Keep platform-specific defaults intact.

title: Update storage.test.ts to use the override env var
description: Swap XDG_CONFIG_HOME (ignored on macOS) for the new override env var.

title: Update cli/e2e.test.ts to use the override env var
description: Same swap for the e2e CLI test runner.

title: Verify all ava tests pass
description: Run full ava suite + type-check to confirm no regressions.
